title: VayuDrishti Nowcast
description: Spatial gap-filled nowcast on the 0.01 degree grid plus ward rollups. Owner: vayu-models. Contract per spec 2026-07-22 section 8. cell_id convention section 5.0: {city}_{row}_{col}. ward_id convention section 5.0: {city}_{zeropad3(id)}. Headline metric is PM2.5 sub-index on the trailing-24h mean, labeled 'PM2.5 sub-index (24h)'.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 with Z suffix, per section 5.0 storage convention.

fixture.description: Optional. Present and true only on fixture/sample data. Absent or false on real published data. Consumers show a 'sample data' banner when true.

lat0.description: SW-corner origin latitude, city bbox floored to 0.01 deg.

lon0.description: SW-corner origin longitude, city bbox floored to 0.01 deg.

cell_deg.description: Cell edge in degrees. 0.01 per section 5.0.

grid.description: Flat array of grid cells. Reconstruct cell centroid or SW corner as lat = lat0 + row*cell_deg, lon = lon0 + col*cell_deg.

pm25_p90.description: PM2.5 ug/m3, 90th-percentile quantile. Content gate additionally enforces p90 >= p50.

subindex24h.description: CPCB PM2.5 sub-index on the trailing-24h mean. Capped at 500.

wards.description: Ward-level rollups (area-weighted cell aggregation). ward_id joins to wards.geojson.
